chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-644 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 04-10-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the respondents submits that entire pensionery benefits have been paid to the petitioner save Rs. 9,63,249/-, which he submits would be paid to the petitioner in three equal monthly installments. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of. However, non-payment or default in aforesaid amount to the petitioner would expose the respondents No.4 to 6 to the contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
